content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年06月04日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus](https://github.com/pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus)
   Self-hosted AI workspace. | ⭐43387
2. [asz798838958/aBaiAutoplus](https://github.com/asz798838958/aBaiAutoplus)
   多平台 AI 账号自动注册与管理 · 协议化付款一键开通 ChatGPT Plus | ⭐1383
3. [ClaudioDrews/memory-os](https://github.com/ClaudioDrews/memory-os)
   A 7-layer memory operating system for Hermes Agent — persistent memory with Qdra | ⭐748
4. [jd-opensource/JoyAI-Echo](https://github.com/jd-opensource/JoyAI-Echo)
   JoyAI-Echo: Pushing the Frontier of Long Audio-Visual Generation | ⭐252
5. [johnbean393/KeyType](https://github.com/johnbean393/KeyType)
   An open-source Cotypist with macOS system wide AI autocomplete | ⭐231
6. [PentesterFlow/agent](https://github.com/PentesterFlow/agent)
   Agentic offensive-security in your terminal | ⭐207
7. [duncatzat/vigils](https://github.com/duncatzat/vigils)
   A local control plane for AI agents — see what they do, approve what matters, ke | ⭐205
8. [stormneonnightraven4640692/DeepFake-AI-RealTime](https://github.com/stormneonnightraven4640692/DeepFake-AI-RealTime)
   An advanced, LLM-powered toolkit providing comprehensive capabilities for ethica | ⭐182

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
